news.t: Manulife John Hancock Investments Launches New Active Hedged Equity ETF

holdings.infoBox: JHDG is an equity ETF with a total of 149 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.43%, Microsoft at 6.48%, Amazon.com at 6.09%, NVIDIA at 4.63%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.22%.

overview.description: The John Hancock Hedged Equity ETF (JHDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, providing exposure to US large-cap stocks along with a flexible options overlay strategy. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation while hedging market downturns. JHDG was launched on Apr 8, 2026 and is issued by John Hancock.

data.title: Manulife John Hancock Investments Launches New Active Hedged Equity ETF
data.text: BOSTON, April 8, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Manulife John Hancock Investments today announced the launch of John Hancock Hedged Equity ETF (NYSE Arca: JHDG), managed by Manulife Investment Management (Manuli...
